prompt: Luxury fashion casting contact sheet of a woman with thick espresso-brown curls gathered into a loose sculptural updo, arranged in a clean 2x2 grid of four close portrait frames against a deep cobalt-blue backdrop, wearing a silk champagne-colored blouse and oversized gold statement earrings.
